revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-3-320

Alternative term: Semi-duplex

The operation of a circuit designed for duplex operation, but which, on account of the nature of the terminal equipment, can be operated in one direction only at a time.

Reference: I.E.C. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
